examples: The walls of anti-Semitism were closing in.
It is also a reminder of the deep roots of anti-Semitism, in France and beyond.
Barring a new burst of anti-Semitism, the map of world Jewry will change slowly from now on.
One of the first sentences the Pope uttered in Israel was an unequivocal condemnation of anti-Semitism.
The German-born Pope added that the Roman Catholic Church remained committed to fighting anti-Semitism.
